failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Implement inline filtration and regular cleaning protocols

failure_modes.cause: Unexpected exothermic reaction leading to rapid pressure increase
failure_modes.mitigation: Install pressure relief valve and monitor temperature closely

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform reaction at varying temperatures (110°C, 120°C, 130°C) to assess pressure stability
Conduct a continuous run for 8 hours to evaluate potential for microreactor blockage
